# Sadhana
> A top-tier mobile application built entirely in the Antigravity agentic environment.
> **Project Root:** `D:\Desktop\Fitness`

## Core Files
- [docs/playbook/00_MASTER_PLAYBOOK.md]: Master development playbook — 10 phases from discovery to launch
- [docs/playbook/01_DOCUMENT_INDEX.md]: Wiki-style catalogue of all project documentation
- [docs/playbook/02_SKILL_QUICKREF.md]: Quick-reference for 50+ agent skills and when to use them
- [docs/PRODUCT_REQUIREMENTS.md]: Product requirements document (Phase 1)
- [docs/design/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md]: Design system tokens and component specs (Phase 3)
- [docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md]: Technical architecture and system design (Phase 4)

## Key Concepts
- Agentic Development: Autonomous AI agents build each feature with human-in-the-loop approval gates
- Subagent-Driven: Fresh subagent per task with two-stage review (spec compliance → code quality)
- Planning-with-Files: Persistent working memory via task_plan.md, findings.md, progress.md
- Phase-Gated: 10 sequential phases, each producing required documentation before code

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React Native + Expo + TypeScript (strict mode)
- Styling: NativeWind (Tailwind CSS v4 for React Native)
- State: Zustand + React Query
- Backend: TBD (Supabase / Firebase / Custom Node.js — decided in Phase 4, ADR-001)
- Payments: TBD (Stripe / RevenueCat / Native IAP — decided in Phase 6, ADR-005)
- Testing: Jest + React Native Testing Library + Detox/Maestro

## Status
- Current Phase: 0 (Project Bootstrap)
- Next Milestone: User approval of playbook → Phase 1 Discovery
